sections.paragraph:
αἰσχυντηρός, ά, όν (Pla. et al.; Sir 26:15; 32:10; 41:27) pert. to having regard for decency, modest (w. τρυφερός, πραΰς, ἡσύχιος) of the righteous angel Hm 6, 2, 3.—DELG s.v. αἶσχος.

Pla Pla , V–IV b.c.; s. also Ps.-Plato—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

pert. pert. = pertaining (to)

Hm Hm = Mandates

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 30
